data.title: HARIO to Feature Two New V60 Dripper Innovations at World of Coffee San Diego 2026, Including V60 Dripper NEO and V60 Surfboard Base Dripper
data.description: A prominent heatproof glass manufacturer, HARIO, recognized for the V60 Coffee Dripper, is set to unveil the V60 Surfboard Base Dripper for the first time in the US at the World of Coffee event in San Diego.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Much Shelist/
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Much Shelist announced the launch of their Tech Innovation, Data, and Financial Regulation Practice. The company has introduced this new practice area to cater to the rapidly evolving tech industry. It aims to provide comprehensive legal services in areas such as data protection, cybersecurity, and financial regulations. This initiative underscores Much Shelist's commitment to meeting the growing demands of tech companies. The updated news release emphasizes the firm's specialization in guiding clients through the complex regulatory landscape, with a focus on delivering tailored solutions. Much Shelist is dedicated to supporting businesses in navigating the intricate legal challenges of the digital age. This strategic move reflects the increasing importance of legal counsel in the tech sector and the firm's dedication to excellence in serving its clients.

data.title: ATOM price may reach $1.85 by mid-April 2026. Currently trading at $1.71 with RSI at 42.71. Support at $1.68.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently being traded at $1.71 per unit, with a relative strength index (RSI) standing at 42.71, indicating a neutral trend. Analysis of the technical aspects of the market indicates the possibility of a recovery towards the $1.85 resistance level, provided that the current support at $1.68 remains stable throughout the month of April.

data.title: RET Ventures Launches AI Accelerator Program to Support Early-Stage Startups Shaping the Future of Rental Technology
data.description: Based in Park City, Utah, RET Ventures recently unveiled its first-ever ‘RET Ventures AI Accelerator Program.’ This initiative aims to assist early-stage startups developing AI-powered technologies in the real estate sector, particularly focusing on leasing and apartment marketing solutions. The program seeks to support entrepreneurs and real estate operators by providing resources and expertise to drive innovation. The program's inaugural cohort will work on advancing technologies tailored for multifamily properties.

data.title: Trade fraud and accounting tricks on the rise as tariffs increase, U.S. imports from China drop, with billions attributed to deceit.
data.description: Imports from China into the United States have considerably decreased recently. However, it seems that a significant portion of the reported decrease, amounting to billions of dollars, can be attributed to deceptive accounting practices and fraudulent activities.

data.title: ANA Global Appoints MedTech Industry Veteran Mike Sanford as Chief Commercial Officer to Drive Strategic Growth
data.description: On April 7, 2026, ANA Global, LLC, a company specialized in high-precision injection molding, metal stamping, and integrated assembly for the medical device and life sciences industries, revealed the selection of Mike Sanford as their new Chief Commercial Officer. This decision highlights ANA Global's strategic move to enhance its commercial operations and further its presence in the medical sector.

data.title: Xtreme One Entertainment Secures Temporary Restraining Order Against Lender Williamsburg Venture Holdings, Halting Alleged Fraudulent Transfer and Sale of $XONI Stock
data.description: An emergency court order mandating the prompt return of shares by Williamsburg and securities intermediaries has been issued due to an alleged breach of contract and a fraudulent transfer. The order demands the immediate return of a significant number of shares involved in the transaction. This legal action underscores the severity of the situation and the urgency of rectifying the alleged misconduct.

data.title: Voltalia SA: Total number of shares and voting rights in the share capital as of February 28, 2026
data.description: As of February 28, 2026, the total number of shares and voting rights in the share capital stand at a significant figure according to the provisions set forth in Articles L. 233-8 (II) of the French Commercial Code and 223-16 of the General Regulations of the French Financial Markets Authority.

data.title: Weekly report share buyback from March 30 to April 2, 2026
data.description: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has disclosed its recent share buyback activity as required by regulations. Between March 30, 2026, and April 2, 2026, the company repurchased an undisclosed number of its own shares.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Fitness Product (LBT-9702)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 7, 2026, an inventor from Williamstown, N.J. shared their inspiration for creating a new fitness product. The product is designed to replicate the traditional African food-processing method of pounding cocoyam, akin to churning butter. The inventor expressed their goal to simulate these motions and actions through the creation of the SIMON.

data.title: Construction Summit Arizona to Connect Employers with Next-Generation Talent in Phoenix
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Phoenix, the renowned construction labor management platform, Lumber, will be hosting the Construction Summit Arizona. This event aims to bring together construction company owners, workforce managers, and up-and-coming skilled workers. Scheduled to take place in Arizona, this high-impact industry summit will provide a platform for networking and collaboration among industry professionals and the younger workforce.

data.title: UNI price eyes $4.18 breakout by May 2026. Currently trading at $3.03, RSI at 31.98 indicates potential bounce to $5.85.
data.description: The UNI token is currently trading at a price of $3.03, showing bearish momentum. However, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at an oversold level of 31.98, indicating a possible rebound in the near future. There is a significant resistance level at $4.18, breaking which could lead to a rally towards the target price of $5.85.
